python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 5qubits --init-mode structured_linspace --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/5qubits/runs/20260318_dist_lowmem_nocompress/5qubits_structured
python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 10qubits --init-mode structured_linspace --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/10qubits/runs/20260318_dist_lowmem_nocompress/10qubits_structured
python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 30qubits --init-mode structured_linspace --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/30qubits/runs/20260318_dist_lowmem_nocompress/30qubits_structured
python MPS_simulation/dist/run_nocompress_case.py --label-dir 5qubits --init-mode random_uniform --iterations 200 --report-every 5 --init-seed 1234 --out-dir /gpfs/home/tonshen/Seawulf_simulation/MPS_simulation/dist/5qubits/runs/20260318_dist_lowmem_nocompress/5qubits_random_seed=1234
